story.iWant: to see if my device supports image generation before downloading the model
story.soThat: I don't waste bandwidth on an incompatible device
story.tasks: - [ ] Task 1: Add IMAGE_GENERATION task ID to BuiltInTaskId (AC: #3) - [ ] Task 2: Create ImageGenerationTask class (AC: #3, #4) - [ ] Task 3: Register task via Hilt module (AC: #3, #4) - [ ] Task 4: Implement device capability checking (AC: #1, #2) - [ ] Task 5: Validation testing (AC: #1, #2, #3, #4)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. **AC1:** Device compatibility info displayed: "Requires 8GB+ RAM, Android 12+" 2. **AC2:** Warning shown if device has <6GB RAM 3. **AC3:** IMAGE_GENERATION task ID registered in Tasks.kt 4. **AC4:** Image Generation tile appears on home screen

doc.title: Epic 7: AI Image Generation
doc.section: Story 7.1: Task Registration & Device Capability Check
doc.snippet: Add IMAGE_GENERATION task ID, check RAM >= 6GB, Android 12+. Follow LlmAskImageTask pattern. Register via Hilt @IntoSet.

doc.title: Previous Story Learnings
doc.snippet: OpenCL declarations added. MODEL_IMAGE_GENERATION_STABLE_DIFFUSION already defined in Model.kt. Extraction path verified.

artifact.reason: Need to add IMAGE_GENERATION constant here and update allBuiltInTaskIds set
Already contains MODEL_IMAGE_GENERATION_STABLE_DIFFUSION - use this for task models list
Task data class definition - use for creating ImageGenerationTask instance

constraints.constraint: Follow existing task registration patterns in Tasks.kt
Use MODELS_IMAGE_GENERATION list from Model.kt (already defined)
Minimum 6GB RAM for warning threshold, 8GB+ recommended
Register task via Hilt dependency injection with @IntoSet

interface.name: isBuiltInTask
interface.purpose: Checks if a task ID is a built-in task - must recognize IMAGE_GENERATION after adding it

tests.standards: Manual testing on physical device. Verify task tile appears, model info displays correctly, compatibility warnings show for low-RAM devices.
tests.locations: - Manual testing on device - Verify home screen shows Image Generation tile - Check model management for compatibility info

test.description: Verify IMAGE_GENERATION added to BuiltInTaskId and allBuiltInTaskIds set
Build app, install on device, verify Image Generation tile appears on home screen
Navigate to model management, check compatibility info display and RAM warnings
